summary: Comprehensive backend + frontend testing of Maldives AI Retail Concierge MVP. All 10 backend pytest cases passed (health, AI chat with Claude Sonnet 4.5, Find-it-for-me, product-description, sourcing CRUD, orders create/get/status/404). Frontend e2e flows verified end-to-end: home renders luxury hero + 7 bento categories + Male island default, island selector dialog opens with all atolls, Shop page lists 30 products, ProductDetail Add-to-cart + Buy Now flow, Checkout posts to /api/orders and routes to /order-success/{number}, Track page loads order by number, Admin password gate (raalhu2026) works and Orders tab advances fulfillment_status via Advance button (verified Payment pending state). AI integrations live: /ai page chats with Claude and gets reply; FIFM generated structured AI draft (boAt Airdopes 141, MVR 243, 7-12 days). Floating AI chat panel opens via floating-ai-button and replies via /api/ai/chat.

minor.issue: claude_chat() swallows exceptions and returns string '(AI temporarily unavailable: ...)' with HTTP 200 instead of surfacing 5xx. Frontend cannot easily detect AI failures.
Uses @app.on_event('shutdown') which is deprecated in FastAPI 0.93+. Migrate to lifespan context manager.

integration_issues.issue: Page uses data-testid 'ai-page-input' / 'ai-page-send' but review spec mentions 'ai-chat-input' / 'ai-chat-send' (which are the floating AIChatPanel testids). Both work in their respective contexts; only a naming-convention inconsistency, no functional break.

action_items: (Optional) Surface AI failures as proper HTTP errors so frontend can show retry UI; currently a 'AI temporarily unavailable' string is returned with 200.
(Optional) Align testid naming between /ai page (ai-page-*) and floating panel (ai-chat-*) if a unified test contract is desired.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py module-level helper function 'order_number()' has the same name as the route path parameter in /api/orders/{order_number}; works but confusing — consider renaming the helper to gen_order_number().
All endpoints exclude MongoDB _id via projection. Good.
Inputs validated via Pydantic models. Good.
Frontend uses process.env.REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL — no hardcoding observed.

data-testid present on all critical interactive elements (header-cart, hero-shop-cta, product-card-*, add-to-cart-button, buy-now-button, checkout-place-order, fifm-ai-draft, fifm-submit, admin-*, advance-*, floating-ai-button, etc.). Good.

success_rate.frontend: ~95% (all critical flows pass; one naming inconsistency on /ai page testids only)

seed_data_creation: Created via tests: 1 sourcing request (TEST_Customer Ali), 2 orders (MV26062635AFA via pytest with TEST_Buyer + MV26062616FA1 via UI e2e with TEST_E2E Buyer). Order MV26062635AFA was advanced to payment_confirmed; MV26062616FA1 advanced to payment_pending via Admin UI.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_concierge_api.py (pytest, JUnit XML at /app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml). Use BASE = REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Claude Sonnet 4.5 via EMERGENT_LLM_KEY is live and working. /ai page uses ai-page-input/ai-page-send testids; floating chat (toggle via floating-ai-button) uses ai-chat-input/ai-chat-send. Admin password gate is raalhu2026. Test orders created in MongoDB collection 'orders' with TEST_ prefix on customer_name for cleanup.
rca of the issue: No critical issues. AI page testid naming difference is intentional/contextual (page vs panel) — agent E1 can align if desired.
